Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that eventually lead to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include both activities
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the total time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to be performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in successful variants (ending in Payment Handled) versus variants that later result in any rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Payment Handled occurs

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants where the budget owner and supervisor are different roles versus when they are the same
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in cases that go through the full approval chain including PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that later encounter Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in cases where both occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Request Payment in successful paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER after the execution of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants with three or more approval steps
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER'
